cage.example: The bird sang inside its cage.
Wild animals should not be caged.
cage.example_zh: 野生動物不該被關進籠子。

calendar.example: I marked the date on my calendar.
calendar.example_zh: 我在日曆上標記了那個日期。

calm.example: She tried to calm the crying baby.
calm.example_zh: 她試著安撫哭鬧的寶寶。

camel.example: A camel can live in the desert.

cancel.example: They had to cancel the trip.
cancel.example_zh: 他們不得不取消這趟旅行。

candle.example: She lit a candle on the cake.

capital.example: Tokyo is the capital of Japan.
They need more capital to start the business.
capital.example_zh: 他們需要更多資金來創業。

capital.example: Begin a sentence with a capital letter.
capital.example_zh: 句子開頭要用大寫字母。

cash.example: I paid for the meal in cash.
He cashed the check at the bank.

castle.example: The king lived in a huge castle.
castle.example_zh: 國王住在一座巨大的城堡裡。

cause.example: What was the cause of the fire?
cause.example_zh: 這場火災的起因是什麼？
開車不小心會造成意外。

ceiling.example: A lamp hangs from the ceiling.

cell.example: The body is made of tiny cells.
cell.example_zh: 人體是由微小的細胞構成的。

cell.example: Please turn off your cell phone.

centimeter.example: The pencil is fifteen centimeters long.

central.example: The hotel is in the central part of town.

century.example: The castle was built in the last century.
century.example_zh: 這座城堡建於上個世紀。

cereal.example: I eat cereal with milk every morning.
cereal.example_zh: 我每天早上吃加牛奶的麥片。

chain.example: She wore a gold chain around her neck.
chain.example_zh: 她脖子上戴著一條金鍊子。

chain.example: It is a famous chain of coffee shops.
chain.example_zh: 這是一家有名的連鎖咖啡店。

chalk.example: The teacher wrote with white chalk.

challenge.example: Learning English is a fun challenge.
challenge.example_zh: 學英文是個有趣的挑戰。

challenge.example: She challenged him to a chess game.
challenge.example_zh: 她向他下戰帖比一場棋。

channel.example: Please change to another TV channel.
We solved it through official channels.
channel.example_zh: 我們透過正式管道解決。

chapter.example: I read the first chapter of the book.
chapter.example_zh: 我讀了這本書的第一章。

character.example: Honesty is part of her character.
character.example_zh: 誠實是她性格的一部分。

character.example: My favorite character in the story is brave.
character.example_zh: 我最喜歡故事裡那個勇敢的角色。

charge.example: They charge ten dollars for the ticket.
There is no charge for children.
I need to charge my phone.

chart.example: The chart shows our monthly sales.
chart.example_zh: 這張圖表顯示我們的每月銷售。

chart.example: Her new song topped the charts.
chart.example_zh: 她的新歌登上排行榜冠軍。

chase.example: The cat likes to chase mice.
The movie has an exciting car chase.
chase.example_zh: 這部電影有刺激的飛車追逐。

cheat.example: It is wrong to cheat on a test.

cheer.example: The fans cheered for their team.
cheer.example_zh: 球迷為他們的隊伍加油。
她的微笑讓我打起精神。

chemical.example: We did a chemical experiment in class.
chemical.example_zh: 我們在課堂上做了化學實驗。

chess.example: My father taught me how to play chess.

chief.example: He is the chief of the fire station.

childish.example_zh: 他幼稚的行為惹惱了大家。

china.example: The Great Wall is in China.
These cups are made of fine china.
china.example_zh: 這些杯子是用上等瓷器做的。

chopstick.example: I learned to eat with chopsticks.

claim.example: He claimed that he saw a ghost.
She went to claim her lost bag.

clap.example: The audience clapped after the show.
We heard a clap of thunder.

classic.example: The novel is a classic of world literature.
classic.example_zh: 這本小說是世界文學的經典。

classical.example: She enjoys listening to classical music.

classmate.example: My classmate lent me a pencil.

clever.example: The clever fox tricked the crow.

click.example: Click the button to start the game.
The door shut with a click.

climate.example: This area has a warm climate.

cloth.example: She wiped the table with a cloth.

clothing.example: We donated clothing to the poor.

cloudy.example: It is cloudy and might rain soon.
cloudy.example_zh: 天色多雲，可能快下雨了。

coal.example: They burn coal to keep warm.

cockroach-roach.example: A cockroach ran across the kitchen floor.
cockroach-roach.example_zh: 一隻蟑螂從廚房地板上跑過。

cocoa.example: She drank a warm cup of cocoa.
cocoa.example_zh: 她喝了一杯溫熱的可可。

coin.example: He dropped a coin into the box.
coin.example_zh: 他把一枚硬幣投進箱子。

cola-coke.example: I would like a glass of cola.

college.example: My sister studies at a college in Taipei.
college.example_zh: 我姊姊在台北一所大學念書。

combine.example: Combine the eggs and sugar in a bowl.

comic.example: He likes to read comic books.
The actor is famous for his comic roles.
comic.example_zh: 這位演員以喜劇角色聞名。

command.example: The dog obeys its owner's commands.
command.example_zh: 那隻狗服從主人的命令。

commercial.example: The downtown area is a commercial district.
A loud commercial interrupted the show.
commercial.example_zh: 一段大聲的廣告打斷了節目。

company.example: My uncle works for a big company.
company.example_zh: 我叔叔在一家大公司上班。
